scripts.//: bootstrap is chained explicitly into dev/build/start (not a predev/prebuild hook) because npm skips pre/post lifecycle scripts when ignore-scripts=true; a hook would silently no-op, leaving technology/ unsynced and /technology/* 404ing. Do not convert it back to a pre* hook.
scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm run sync && node scripts/build-likec4.mjs
